headline: Trump 🍊👑 DUMPS Hormuz TOLL 💸⛴️ - Gulf DEALS 💰🌴 BLOCK Iran 🚫🇮🇷
text: Trump 🍊👑 straight-up SCRAPS his 20% Hormuz TOLL 💸⛴️ just 24 HOURS after dropping that BOMB 💣, trading it for MASSIVE Gulf TRADE DEALS 💰🌴 that are gonna make everyone RICH AF 💎🤝! US Central Command 🪖🚀 just kicked off ROUND 4 of STRIKES 🔥 against Iran to KEEP that strait WIDE OPEN for the whole WORLD 🌍 except Tehran 🚫🇮🇷 – oil is flowing like a BROKEN FAUCET 💧🛢️ thanks to US MILITARY POWER 🇺🇸💪! Brent Crude 📈🛢️ went BRRRRR 😩💨 as tanker traffic through Hormuz hit a 2-MONTH LOW 🐢📉, with Iran basically SHUTTING the door 🚪❌ after Feb 28 strikes. Trump 🍊 said 'NO MORE FEE' 😤 after Gulf leaders blew up his phone 📱☎️, promising 'EXTRAORDINARILY GOOD' investments 💵🤝 that will SLAY for everyone! Iran Deputy Gharibabadi 😤🇮🇷 cried FOUL saying the blockade DUMPED the truce deal 🤝💥, while Tehran still claims it OWNS the strait 👑⛴️. Netanyahu 🕎🦅 warned Iran 'DON'T START NOTHIN' or Israel retaliation gonna be 'MUCH MORE POWERFUL' 💥💣! UAE 🇦🇪😡 condemned Iran's 'BRAZEN' tanker attacks on two UAE ships 🛢️💥, while US forces disabled 4 vessels and redirected 100 during the April blockade. Traffic through Hormuz which carries 25% WORLD OIL 🌍🛢️ and 20% LNG 💨🔥 is basically GHOSTED 👻🚢 right now. Trump 🍊 on Truth Social 📱🔥 said 'STRAIT OPEN TO ALL except Iran' and 'INVESTMENTS will be MASSIVE' – basically turning the waterway into a US GUARDIANSHIP 🛡️👑 playground! Oil prices POPPED 📈😱 as Centcom launched THIRD NIGHT of strikes targeting Iranian capabilities used to ATTACK shipping 🚢💥, with blasts reported in Bushehr nuclear plant city 🏭💥! Iran hit back targeting US facilities in Bahrain and Jordan 🇧🇭🇯🇴💣 after earlier tanker drama. Trump 🍊 told Iraqi PM Ali al-Zaidi 🤝🇮🇶 'not FAIR we protect this for the WORLD' so he swapped the FEE for GULF CASH 💵🌴 instead! Shipping data shows tanker traffic SLOWED DRAMATICALLY 🐌📉 while Trump 🍊 keeps flexing that US MILITARY MUSCLE 💪🚀! Iran vows to STAY in CONTROL 👑⛴️ but the US blockade is SQUEEZING Tehran's economy like a LEMON 🍋😩! Netanyahu 🕎 warned 'DON'T COUNT ON QUIET' if Iran attacks first – retaliation gonna be NEXT LEVEL 🔥💥! UAE tankers got HIT 💥🛢️ and Iran claims it dismantled the truce deal 🤝💥 but Trump 🍊 says oil flowing 'LIKE NEVER BEFORE' thanks to US POWER 🇺🇸💪! Gulf states getting ready to DROP MASSIVE investments 💰🌴 into US while Hormuz stays OPEN for EVERYONE except Iran 🚫🇮🇷 – it's basically an OIL ORGY 💦🛢️ with Trump 🍊 as the BOUNCER 👮‍♂️💪! Centcom forces launched ADDITIONAL STRIKES 🔥 to degrade Iranian capabilities used to attack commercial shipping 🚢💥 while Brent Crude went BRRRRR 📈😩! Trump 🍊 reversed the 20% FEE after Gulf leaders called 📱☎️ promising 'EXTRAORDINARILY GOOD' deals 💰🤝 that will make everyone RICH AF 💎🌴! Iran says it remains in CONTROL of the strait 👑⛴️ but US blockade is SQUEEZING their economy like a LEMON 🍋😩 while oil flows 'LIKE NEVER BEFORE' 💧🛢️ thanks to US MILITARY POWER 🇺🇸💪! Netanyahu 🕎 warned Iran 'DON'T START NOTHIN' or retaliation gonna be 'MUCH MORE POWERFUL' 💥💣 while UAE condemned Iran's 'BRAZEN' tanker attacks 🛢️💥! Traffic through Hormuz which carries 25% WORLD OIL 🌍🛢️ and 20% LNG 💨🔥 is basically GHOSTED 👻🚢 right now as Trump 🍊 keeps flexing that US MILITARY MUSCLE 💪🚀!
